description_long: This object consists of three distinct wooden furniture pieces: two tall shelving units and a smaller nightstand or side table. The shelving units feature open shelves with a decorative arch at the top, providing ample space for storing or displaying items. The smaller piece has two drawers with visible handles, suitable for storing smaller objects. All three pieces are constructed from a dark, rich wood with a matte finish, giving them a classic and sturdy appearance. The backs of the shelving units are solid, while the front sides are open for easy access. The overall design is traditional, making these pieces suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, libraries, or residential interiors.
description: A set of three dark wooden furniture pieces: two tall open shelves with decorative arches and a small two-drawer nightstand, all with a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves of the two tall units and the drawers of the small nightstand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the shelving units, with the nightstand barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid backs of the shelving units and the back of the nightstand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profiles of the shelves and the nightstand's drawers.
